home.hero_tagline: Beauty Inspired by the Golden Light
home.hero_sub: Luxury cosmetics crafted for the radiant you
home.story_body: Born from a love of luminous beauty, Auréalis blends the finest ingredients with the spirit of the golden hour. Every product is a testament to the art of feeling radiant.
home.newsletter_subtitle: Be the first to discover new arrivals and exclusive offers

footer.tagline: Beauty Inspired by the Golden Light

about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Auréalis is a new-generation Egyptian skincare and beauty house built on a natural, minimal, and elegant point of view. We balance science and simplicity so daily rituals can hydrate, protect, and help skin glow with quiet confidence.
about.p2: Our name is rooted in aure, gold — a nod to the golden hour when light feels soft, warm, and full of promise. We care about radiance, purity, and timelessly considered beauty, inspired by the women of Cairo and beyond.
about.v1: Modern, minimal, and never loud for the sake of it.
about.v2: Natural clarity — formulas that feel comfortable on skin and in life.
about.v3: Aspirational but accessible: luxury you can live in every day.

contact.title: Contact
contact.kicker: We would love to hear from you
contact.intro: For orders, product advice, or partnerships, send a message and our team will respond as soon as possible.
contact.form_success: Thank you — this demo does not send email yet, but your message is noted.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: We currently ship within Egypt. International shipping is coming soon — join the newsletter to be the first to know.
faq.a2: This demo checkout simulates an order. In production, you will be able to pay with cards and other methods supported in your region at checkout.
faq.q3: Are your products tested on animals?
faq.a3: Auréalis is committed to ethical practices. See individual product pages for the latest information as our range grows.
faq.q4: How do I return an item?
faq.a4: Please read our Shipping & Returns page. Unopened items in original packaging may be returned within 14 days where applicable, subject to local law.
faq.a5: Use the contact form on this site or write to hello@aurealis.com.

shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
shipping.intro: We pack every order with care. Delivery times and fees are confirmed at checkout once live payment and courier integrations are connected.
shipping.delivery: Standard delivery in Greater Cairo is typically 2–4 business days; other cities may take longer. You will receive tracking details by email or SMS when available.
shipping.returns: If you are not satisfied, you may return unopened products in their original packaging within 14 days of delivery, unless the item is final sale. Refunds are processed to the original payment method where possible.
shipping.int: International shipping is not available in this preview. Terms may be updated when we launch worldwide.

legal.privacy_p1: Auréalis (“we”, “us”) respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect personal information when you use our website.
legal.privacy_p2: We may collect information you provide (such as name, email, and shipping address) when you create an order, contact us, or subscribe to our newsletter. We also collect basic technical data (e.g. browser type) to keep the site secure and improve experience.
legal.privacy_p3: We use your data to process orders, respond to messages, and send service-related communications. With your consent, we may send marketing emails; you can unsubscribe at any time.
legal.privacy_p4: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it with service providers (hosting, payment, analytics) who act on our instructions and under contract.
legal.privacy_p5: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data where applicable. Contact us at the email on our contact page. We may update this policy periodically; the date above will change when we do.
legal.terms_p1: By using this website, you agree to these terms. The site and its content are provided for information and e-commerce in line with our offering at the time of access.
legal.terms_p2: Product descriptions, images, and prices are as accurate as possible; we reserve the right to correct errors and to refuse or cancel orders in cases of unavailability, fraud risk, or legal restriction.
legal.terms_p3: You are responsible for providing correct shipping and contact details. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the carrier as described in our shipping information.
legal.terms_p4: Our liability is limited to the fullest extent permitted by law. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of the site or products, except where liability cannot be excluded by law.
legal.terms_p5: These terms are governed by the laws applicable in the Arab Republic of Egypt, unless otherwise required. Disputes should first be raised through our contact channels.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.demo_note: If Paymob is not configured, you can still place a demo order for testing.
checkout.paymob_ready_note: Card payments are enabled. You can pay with card (Paymob) or use the demo order option below for internal testing only.
checkout.empty_body: Add something beautiful before you check out.
checkout.payment_note: Use "Pay with card" for production-style checkout once Paymob keys are set. "Place demo order" marks the order without charging a card.
checkout.error_paymob_hmac: We could not verify the payment redirect. If you were charged, contact support with your order reference.
checkout.error_payment_declined: The card payment was not completed. You can try again or use another method.
checkout.error_rate_limited: Too many payment attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
checkout.error_generic: Payment could not be started. Please try again or contact us.

orderSuccess.title: Thank you
orderSuccess.message: Your order has been received. We will follow up with confirmation details.

account.title: My account
account.body: Sign-in, order history, and saved addresses are not connected yet. This page is a placeholder for your future account area. For help with an order, please contact us.
